title: DocumentToolLibrary Object
description: DocumentToolLibrary provides access to tools used by the document. It supports adding, updating and deleting tools in the document tool library.

methods.name: add
methods.description: Inserts a Tool at the end of the ToolLibrary.

methods.name: classType
methods.description: Static function that all classes support that returns the type of the class as a string. The returned string matches the string returned by the objectType property. For example if you have a reference to an object and you want to check if it's a SketchLine you can use myObject.objectType == fusion.SketchLine.classType().

methods.name: createFromJson
methods.description: Creates a ToolLibrary by given JSON-string. Raises an error if the given JSON is invalid.

methods.name: createQuery
methods.description: Creates a new ToolQuery that is used to query the library for tools matching the query.

methods.name: item
methods.description: Get Tool by index in ToolLibrary.

methods.name: operationsByTool
methods.description: Returns all operations that use the given tool. The tool must exist in the document tool library. Raises an error if the tool is not in the document.

methods.name: remove
methods.description: Remove Tool by index from ToolLibrary.

methods.name: toJson
methods.description: Generate and return JSON string that contains all tools of that list.

methods.name: toolsBySetupOrFolder
methods.description: Returns all tools used in a given setup or folder. Given setup or folder must belong to the document of the DocumentToolLibrary. Raises an error if given operation is not in the document.

methods.name: update
methods.description: Update the given tool in the document tool library. The update applies all changes to the tool in the document tool library and therefore on all operations that use the tool. Will error if the tool does not exist in the document tool library.

properties.name: count
properties.description: The number of tools in the ToolLibrary.

properties.name: isValid
properties.description: Indicates if this object is still valid, i.e. hasn't been deleted or some other action done to invalidate the reference.

properties.name: objectType
properties.description: This property is supported by all objects in the API and returns a string that contains the full name (namespace::objecttype) describing the type of the object.   It's often useful to use this in combination with the classType method to see if an object is a certain type. For example: if obj.objectType == adsk.core.Point3D.classType():

add.title: DocumentToolLibrary.add Method
add.description: Inserts a Tool at the end of the ToolLibrary.
add.return_description: Returns true for successful insertion, false otherwise

parameters.name: tool
parameters.description: The Tool that should be added.

classType.title: DocumentToolLibrary.classType Method
classType.description: Static function that all classes support that returns the type of the class as a string. The returned string matches the string returned by the objectType property. For example if you have a reference to an object and you want to check if it's a SketchLine you can use myObject.objectType == fusion.SketchLine.classType().
classType.return_description: Returns a string indicating the type of the object.

createFromJson.title: DocumentToolLibrary.createFromJson Method
createFromJson.description: Creates a ToolLibrary by given JSON-string. Raises an error if the given JSON is invalid.

parameters.name: json
parameters.description: The JSON contains all tools that should be added to the new ToolLibrary

createQuery.title: DocumentToolLibrary.createQuery Method
createQuery.description: Creates a new ToolQuery that is used to query the library for tools matching the query.
createQuery.return_description: Returns a new ToolQuery. The query is predefined by given parameter.

item.title: DocumentToolLibrary.item Method
item.description: Get Tool by index in ToolLibrary.
item.return_description: Returns the Tool in the ToolLibrary by given index.

parameters.name: index
parameters.description: Index of the Tool in the ToolLibrary.

operationsByTool.title: DocumentToolLibrary.operationsByTool Method
operationsByTool.description: Returns all operations that use the given tool. The tool must exist in the document tool library. Raises an error if the tool is not in the document.
operationsByTool.return_description: Returns operations using a specific tool.

parameters.name: tool
parameters.description: The tool to search for in operations. The tool must exist in the document.

remove.title: DocumentToolLibrary.remove Method
remove.description: Remove Tool by index from ToolLibrary.
remove.return_description: Returns true for successful deletion, false otherwise

parameters.name: index
parameters.description: Index of the Tool in the ToolLibrary that should be removed.

toJson.title: DocumentToolLibrary.toJson Method
toJson.description: Generate and return JSON string that contains all tools of that list.
toJson.return_description: Returns JSON string that contains all tools of that list.

toolsBySetupOrFolder.title: DocumentToolLibrary.toolsBySetupOrFolder Method
toolsBySetupOrFolder.description: Returns all tools used in a given setup or folder. Given setup or folder must belong to the document of the DocumentToolLibrary. Raises an error if given operation is not in the document.
toolsBySetupOrFolder.return_description: Returns tools used by a specific setup or folder.

parameters.name: setupOrFolder
parameters.description: The setup or folder to get tools from. Must belong to the document.

update.title: DocumentToolLibrary.update Method
update.description: Update the given tool in the document tool library. The update applies all changes to the tool in the document tool library and therefore on all operations that use the tool. Will error if the tool does not exist in the document tool library.
update.return_description: Returns true if the update was successful.

parameters.name: tool
parameters.description: The tool that should be updated.

parameters.name: updateFeedAndSpeed
parameters.description: Setting updateFeedAndSpeed to true will override the feed and speed parameters of operations within the document which use the given tool.

count.title: DocumentToolLibrary.count Property
count.description: The number of tools in the ToolLibrary.

syntax.python:
# Get the value of the property.
propertyValue = documentToolLibrary_var.count

isValid.title: DocumentToolLibrary.isValid Property
isValid.description: Indicates if this object is still valid, i.e. hasn't been deleted or some other action done to invalidate the reference.

syntax.python:
# Get the value of the property.
propertyValue = documentToolLibrary_var.isValid

objectType.title: DocumentToolLibrary.objectType Property
objectType.description: This property is supported by all objects in the API and returns a string that contains the full name (namespace::objecttype) describing the type of the object. It's often useful to use this in combination with the classType method to see if an object is a certain type. For example: if obj.objectType == adsk.core.Point3D.classType():

syntax.python:
# Get the value of the property.
propertyValue = documentToolLibrary_var.objectType
